construct: Applies accounting principles to record, verify and report financial information for sound business decisions.

elementsOfConstruct.description: Demonstrates sound accounting decisions based on key accounting principles or concepts,

subSkills.label: Applies key accounting principles/concepts for sound decisions

subSkills.label: Records business transactions in ledger accounts
topicAliases: Types of Books of Prime Entry

subSkills.label: Implements reconciliation and verification tools effectively

Errors revealed by the Trial Balance

components.structureNotes: SBA Form 2-3: 6 tasks each (Form 3 includes subject project Terms 2-3). Final Exam Form 4, 100 marks. Codes 7020/1 and 7020/2.

rules: SBA school-marked formative/summative tasks; evidence retained.
Candidates without SBA are not graded (no partial processing).
Both components contribute to final score.

exemplars.scenarioTheme: Prepare and analyse financial statements for a Zambian trading business (ratios/margins)
